session.user: Run `make fix` and report the results. Do not fix any errors - only report them.
session.assistant: I'll run `make fix` and report the results without making any modifications.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fix target and report results

session.tool_result:
uv run ruff check --fix --unsafe-fixes All checks passed! uv run ruff format 1 file reformatted, 1740 files left unchanged prettier --write '**/*.md' --ignore-path .gitignore --ignore-path .prettierignore [90m.claude/agents/changelog/commit-categorizer.md[39m 150ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/devrun.md[39m 31ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/code-diff-analyzer.md[39m 14ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/documentation-gap-identifier.md[39m 54ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/existing-docs-checker.md[39m 25ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/plan-synthesizer.md[39m 35ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/session-analyzer.md[39m 13ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/learn/tripwire-extractor.md[39m 29ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/agents/libcst-refactor.md[39m 91ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/consolidate-learn-plans.md[39m 21ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/diag-lock-error.md[39m 25ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/diverge-fix.md[39m 19ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/git-pr-push.md[39m 29ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/land.md[39m 21ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/learn.md[39m 67ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/migrate-objective-schema.md[39m 4ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/objective-create.md[39m 48ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/objective-list.md[39m 4ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/objective-plan.md[39m 18ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/objective-reconcile.md[39m 33ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/objective-update-with-closed-plan.md[39m 13ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/one-shot-plan-only.md[39m 7ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/one-shot.md[39m 7ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/plan-implement.md[39m 26ms (unchanged) [90m.claude/commands/erk/plan-save.md[39m 20ms (unchanged)

session.assistant:
## Results
make fix passed: Code formatting and linting automated fixes completed successfully.
**Summary:** - **ruff check --fix --unsafe-fixes**: All checks passed - **ruff format**: 1 file reformatted, 1740 files left unchanged - **prettier --write**: All markdown files checked (0 files needed reformatting, all unchanged)
The `make fix` target successfully executed all three formatting passes: 1. Linting fixes with ruff (unsafe fixes enabled) 2. Code formatting with ruff 3. Markdown formatting with prettier
No errors were encountered during any of the formatting steps.
